target: Skip button on all activities + Grammar Game with 3 game types
summary: Tested 2 new features: 1) Skip button present on every activity step, 2) Grammar Game with mixed game types (error_hunter, word_order, fill_blank). Backend: 8/9 tests passed (1 expected fail for missing vocab game data). Frontend: All features working correctly via UI automation.

minor.issue: Returns 404 - No vocab game data seeded for lesson 2. Shows placeholder in UI (expected behavior, not a bug)

skip_button_all_activities.description: Skip button visible on Warmup, Vocabulary, and all other activities. Clicking Skip advances to next activity and marks current as completed (green checkmark in sidebar).

all_10_activities_in_sidebar.description: All 10 activity steps visible in sidebar: Warm-up, Vocabulary, Vocab Game, Reading, Grammar, Grammar Game, Listening, Speaking, Exit Quiz, Review

grammar_game_error_hunter.description: Error Hunter game type renders with 'Find the Error' badge, 'Correct' (green) and 'Has Error' (red) buttons. Feedback shows 'You got it right!' or 'Not quite!' with correct sentence.

grammar_game_word_order.description: Word Order game type renders with 'Build the Sentence' badge, word bank, answer area, and 'Check Answer' button. Tapping words moves them to answer area.

grammar_game_fill_blank.description: Fill-in-the-Blank game type renders with 'Fill in the Blank' badge, sentence with _____, and 4 clickable options. Clicking option shows correct/incorrect feedback.
grammar_game_fill_blank.evidence: Screenshots showing Fill in the Blank questions like 'My name _____ Sara.' with options

grammar_game_mixed_questions.description: Questions are shuffled/mixed - all 3 types appear in random order. Lesson 2 has 13 questions (5 error_hunter + 4 word_order + 4 fill_blank).
grammar_game_mixed_questions.evidence: Playwright test encountered all 3 game types during playthrough

api_test_results.error_hunter_item_structure: PASS - All items have sentence, has_error, correct_sentence
api_test_results.word_order_item_structure: PASS - All items have words array, correct_sentence
api_test_results.fill_blank_item_structure: PASS - All items have sentence, options array, correct_answer in options
api_test_results.lesson_2_has_10_activities: PASS - activity_flow has 10 activities in correct order

critical_code_review_comments: SkipButton component (line 77-83) is properly integrated into all activity components via onSkip prop
GrammarGame component (line 490-710) correctly combines all 3 item arrays and shuffles them
moveToNextActivity (line 1085) correctly advances without auto-skipping - all 10 steps remain accessible

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 6 features verified via UI automation

seed_data_creation: None - used existing grammar game data from seed_grammar_games.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: Skip button feature fully implemented and working. Grammar Game has 3 game types (error_hunter, word_order, fill_blank) all rendering correctly.
